hooks.command: f=$(jq -er '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath') || { echo 'BLOCK: Unable to determine target file path' >&2; exit 1; }; if echo "$f" | grep -qiE '\.(env|secret|credential|key)|\.env\.|application-(secret|prod|staging)\.(properties|ya?ml)|credentials\.(properties|ya?ml)|bootstrap-(secret|prod)\.(properties|ya?ml)|secret\.properties|keystore|truststore|\.jks|\.p12|\.pem'; then echo 'BLOCK: Refusing to edit sensitive file' >&2; exit 1; fi
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.kts?$'; then ./gradlew ktlintFormat -q; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true
